mapper.select: SELECT * FROM template WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM template WHERE page = #{page} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO template (template_name, template_value, description, page) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{templateValue}, #{description}, #{page})
mapper.update:
UPDATE template
template_name = #{templateName}, template_value = #{templateValue}, description = #{description}, page = #{page},
WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE template SET deleted = 1 WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
